title: AdvancedRTP
description: RTP (Random Teleport) command for modded smp servers.
body:
Hey, i searched for a long time for a 1.19.2 datapack that could rtp players like the spigot plugins (such as BetterRTP) could do, but i could never find one. So i made one!!!

***Features***

- RTP - Random Teleport to anywhere within the worldborder or a predefined radius (default set to 10k) using the command `/trigger rtp`.
- Cooldown - Preset to 30 minute (changeable in the datapack files) cooldown to prevent spam teleporting.
- Messages - Simple messages to show you are teleporting / can not teleport.

Feel free to use this in your smp servers to allow players to rtp into the wild and get far away from spawn quickly! If you have any issues just ping me.
